list.description: Base URL for Portal URL — change to server IP for intranet access
list.label: Portal URL
list.name: portal_url

list.description: Base URL for Grafana URL — change to server IP for intranet access
list.label: Grafana URL
list.name: grafana_url
dbname
list.label: Database

list.name: instance
list.label: Instance

list.name: start_snap
list.label: Start Snap

list.name: end_snap
list.label: End Snap

list.name: baseline_tag
list.label: Baseline (Before)
list.query: SELECT tag_name AS __text, tag_name AS __value FROM awr_comparison_tags WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND tag_type='baseline' ORDER BY created_at DESC;

list.name: current_tag
list.label: Current (After)
list.query: SELECT tag_name AS __text, tag_name AS __value FROM awr_comparison_tags WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND tag_type='current' ORDER BY created_at DESC;

options.content:
BASELINE (Before): $baseline_tag   |   CURRENT (After): $current_tag
Select tags using the dropdowns above. Tags must be created first via the AWR portal or SQL.

targets.rawSql:
WITH baseline AS (
  SELECT event_name, AVG(pct_db_time) AS pct_before, AVG(avg_wait_ms) AS ms_before
  FROM awr_foreground_wait_events w
  JOIN awr_comparison_tags t ON t.dbname = w.dbname
    AND w.begin_snap BETWEEN t.snap_start AND t.snap_end
    AND t.tag_name = '$baseline_tag' AND t.tag_type = 'baseline'
  WHERE w.dbname = '$dbname'
  GROUP BY event_name
),
current_data AS (
  SELECT event_name, AVG(pct_db_time) AS pct_after, AVG(avg_wait_ms) AS ms_after
  FROM awr_foreground_wait_events w
  JOIN awr_comparison_tags t ON t.dbname = w.dbname
    AND w.begin_snap BETWEEN t.snap_start AND t.snap_end
    AND t.tag_name = '$current_tag' AND t.tag_type = 'current'
  WHERE w.dbname = '$dbname'
  GROUP BY event_name
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(b.event_name, c.event_name) AS "Wait Event",
  ROUND(COALESCE(b.pct_before,0),1) AS "Before (% DB Time)",
  ROUND(COALESCE(c.pct_after,0),1) AS "After (% DB Time)",
  ROUND(COALESCE(b.ms_before,0),2) AS "Before Avg Wait (ms)",
  ROUND(COALESCE(c.ms_after,0),2) AS "After Avg Wait (ms)",
  ROUND((COALESCE(c.pct_after,0) - COALESCE(b.pct_before,0)) /
        NULLIF(COALESCE(b.pct_before,0),0) * 100, 1) AS "Change %"
FROM baseline b FULL OUTER JOIN current_data c USING (event_name)
WHERE COALESCE(b.pct_before,0) > 1 OR COALESCE(c.pct_after,0) > 1
ORDER BY ABS(COALESCE(c.pct_after,0) - COALESCE(b.pct_before,0)) DESC
LIMIT 15

WITH baseline AS (
  SELECT sql_id, AVG(elapsed_time_s) AS elapsed_before, SUM(executions) AS exec_before
  FROM awr_sql_elapsed w
  JOIN awr_comparison_tags t ON t.dbname = w.dbname
    AND w.begin_snap BETWEEN t.snap_start AND t.snap_end
    AND t.tag_name = '$baseline_tag' AND t.tag_type = 'baseline'
  WHERE w.dbname = '$dbname'
  GROUP BY sql_id
),
current_data AS (
  SELECT sql_id, AVG(elapsed_time_s) AS elapsed_after, SUM(executions) AS exec_after
  FROM awr_sql_elapsed w
  JOIN awr_comparison_tags t ON t.dbname = w.dbname
    AND w.begin_snap BETWEEN t.snap_start AND t.snap_end
    AND t.tag_name = '$current_tag' AND t.tag_type = 'current'
  WHERE w.dbname = '$dbname'
  GROUP BY sql_id
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(b.sql_id, c.sql_id) AS "SQL ID",
  ROUND(COALESCE(b.elapsed_before,0),2) AS "Before Avg Elapsed (s)",
  ROUND(COALESCE(c.elapsed_after,0),2) AS "After Avg Elapsed (s)",
  COALESCE(b.exec_before,0)::INT AS "Before Executions",
  COALESCE(c.exec_after,0)::INT AS "After Executions",
  ROUND((COALESCE(c.elapsed_after,0) - COALESCE(b.elapsed_before,0)) /
        NULLIF(COALESCE(b.elapsed_before,0),0) * 100, 1) AS "Change %"
FROM baseline b FULL OUTER JOIN current_data c USING (sql_id)
WHERE COALESCE(b.elapsed_before,0) > 5 OR COALESCE(c.elapsed_after,0) > 5
ORDER BY ABS(COALESCE(c.elapsed_after,0) - COALESCE(b.elapsed_before,0)) DESC
LIMIT 15

WITH baseline AS (
  SELECT metric, AVG(per_sec) AS val_before
  FROM awr_load_profile w
  JOIN awr_comparison_tags t ON t.dbname = w.dbname
    AND w.begin_snap BETWEEN t.snap_start AND t.snap_end
    AND t.tag_name = '$baseline_tag' AND t.tag_type = 'baseline'
  WHERE w.dbname = '$dbname'
  GROUP BY metric
),
current_data AS (
  SELECT metric, AVG(per_sec) AS val_after
  FROM awr_load_profile w
  JOIN awr_comparison_tags t ON t.dbname = w.dbname
    AND w.begin_snap BETWEEN t.snap_start AND t.snap_end
    AND t.tag_name = '$current_tag' AND t.tag_type = 'current'
  WHERE w.dbname = '$dbname'
  GROUP BY metric
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(b.metric, c.metric) AS "Metric",
  ROUND(COALESCE(b.val_before,0),2) AS "Before (per sec)",
  ROUND(COALESCE(c.val_after,0),2) AS "After (per sec)",
  ROUND((COALESCE(c.val_after,0) - COALESCE(b.val_before,0)) /
        NULLIF(COALESCE(b.val_before,0),0) * 100, 1) AS "Change %"
FROM baseline b FULL OUTER JOIN current_data c USING (metric)
ORDER BY ABS(COALESCE(c.val_after,0) - COALESCE(b.val_before,0)) / NULLIF(COALESCE(b.val_before,0),0) DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 20
